About Me

From classroom to research lab to startup—building with purpose at every step.

Computer Science graduate from BRAC University with hands-on experience as a Full-Stack and Backend Engineer building multi-tenant architectures, secure web applications, and AI-driven solutions.

Currently serving as Founding Engineer at ClassTablet and Junior Software Engineer at Nyntax—shipping production systems with NestJS, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and TypeScript monorepos while maintaining reliability and performance.

Passionate about applying technical skills to solve real business and user needs, with research experience spanning visual speech recognition, biomedical signal processing, and computer vision.

Reliable code, secure architecture, and measurable impact—engineering should earn trust at every layer of the stack.

  1. Feb 2026 – Present

    Junior Software Engineer @ Nyntax

    Designing and maintaining high-performance software systems—collaborating with product, design, and QA to deliver scalable, maintainable code.

  2. Dec 2025 – Present

    Founding Engineer @ ClassTablet

    Shipping end-to-end product flows on a multi-tenant education platform—Next.js dashboard, NestJS + Fastify API, PostgreSQL, Redis, and payments/messaging infrastructure.

  3. Jan 2022 – Jan 2026

    B.Sc. Computer Science @ BRAC University

    Graduated with CGPA 3.70—building foundations in algorithms, systems, AI/ML, and software engineering through coursework and applied projects.

  4. Jun 2024 – Dec 2025

    Research Member @ BIOSE

    Interdisciplinary biomedical research—computational analysis, experiment design, and documentation for scientific publications.

  5. Jan 2023 – Dec 2025

    Secretary @ BUReD

    Led initiatives at the BRAC University Research for Development Club—organizing research activities and fostering academic collaboration.

Experience

Building products, conducting research, and shipping solutions across domains.

Research

Ongoing
2024 – 2025·Computer Vision / NLP

Adaptive Self-Supervision for Cross-Language Generalization in Multilingual Conformer-Based Visual Speech Recognition

Undergraduate Thesis

Undergraduate thesis exploring self-supervised learning techniques to improve robustness and transferability in multilingual VSR models across resource-constrained languages.

Completed
2025·Computer Vision

The Evolving Paradigm of Vision-Based Fall Detection: A Systematic Review of Methods, Trends, and Challenges

Systematic Review

Comprehensive review analyzing 100 recent architectural studies evaluating CNNs, Transformers, and lightweight networks across diverse, privacy-aware datasets.

Completed
2024·Health Informatics / ML

A Multimodal Framework for Attention Monitoring and Stress Detection Using Wearable Sensors and Computer Vision in Academic Settings

BIOSE Research

Data-driven experimentation at BIOSE integrating computer vision with wearable physiological sensors to monitor stress indicators in academic environments.
